org.apache.dubbo.common.URLBuilder

  • 使用URLBuilder的程序包 
    程序包 说明

      限定符和类型 方法和说明

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addMethodParameterIfAbsent(String method, String key, String value)

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameter(String key, CharSequence value)

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameter(String key, Enum<?> value) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameter(String key, float value)

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameter(String key, long value) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameter(String key, Number value) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameter(String key, short value) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameter(String key, String value) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameterAndEncoded(String key, String value)

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameters(String... pairs) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParametersIfAbsent(Map<String,String> parameters) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.addParameterString(String query) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.clearParameters() 
      static URLBuilder URLBuilder.from(URL url)

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.removeParameters(Collection<String> keys) 
      URLBuilder URLBuilder.removeParameters(String... keys)

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.setHost(String host)

      URLBuilder URLBuilder.setPath(String path)
